description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build PR that triggers on pull requests affecting .cpp, .hpp, .cmake, or CMakeLists.txt files. The workflow has two jobs: Check Formatting and Build. The Check Formatting job runs on ubuntu-24.04, checks code formatting with clang-format, and installs dependencies. The Build job runs on a matrix of operating systems (ubuntu-24.04, windows-2025, macos-15, macos-13), configurations (Debug, RelWithDebInfo), and Vulkan versions (1.4.313.0), and performs a build with Clang-Tidy, installs dependencies, generates a build system with CMake, builds NovelRT, and publishes build artifacts.
